title: rubus chnoostachyoides
intro: Rubus chnoostachyoides, also known as the Chinese bramble or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus chnoostachyoides include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. This plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
